item.text: I’ll use the email tools for the thread, customer/account context, and any policy lookup needed before creating the action.
The thread is a renewal pricing question, so I’m checking CRM context and pricing policy before drafting a reply.
The initial policy and email searches did not find Acme-specific discount history, so I’m broadening the pricing policy search before deciding whether to answer or route it.
Policy says this kind of existing-customer renewal discount question should go to the account owner. I’m forwarding the thread to the listed owner with the supporting CRM and policy evidence.

arguments.note: Maya Chen from Acme Health is asking whether their current Pro plan discount carries over at the 2026-08-30 renewal. Pricing policy says existing customer renewal and discount questions must be forwarded to the account owner.
